---
title: "Peru file"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Instalación de paquete
```{r}
install.packages(c("sf", "ggplot2", "dplyr", "viridis", "geodata"))
```

Cargar librerías
```{r}
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(viridis)
library(geodata)
```

```{r}
ruta_destino <- "C:/Users/GGreb/Downloads/Departamental INEI 2023 geogpsperu SuyoPomalia"
peru_map <- gadm(country = "PER", level = 1, path = ruta_destino)
peru_sf <- st_as_sf(peru_map)
peru_sf$NAME_1
```

```{r}
obesidad_data <- data.frame(
  departamento = c(
    "Amazonas", "Ancash", "Apurímac", "Arequipa", "Ayacucho",
    "Cajamarca", "Callao", "Cusco", "Huancavelica", "Huánuco",
    "Ica", "Junín", "La Libertad", "Lambayeque", "Lima",
    "Loreto", "Madre de Dios", "Moquegua", "Pasco", "Piura",
    "Puno", "San Martín", "Tacna", "Tumbes", "Ucayali"
  ),
  obesidad_pct = c(
    12.1, 15.3, 9.8,  24.1, 10.2,
    11.5, 28.4, 13.7, 8.6,  11.9,
    26.3, 17.2, 20.1, 22.8, 27.5,
    18.9, 19.4, 25.2, 14.3, 21.6,
    12.8, 17.5, 26.8, 24.9, 20.3
  )
)
```

```{r}
# Ver nombres en el mapa
sort(peru_sf$NAME_1)

# Ver tus nombres
sort(obesidad_data$departamento)
```

```{r}
peru_final <- peru_sf %>%
  left_join(obesidad_data, by = c("NAME_1" = "departamento"))

# Verificar que no haya NAs (si hay, algún nombre no coincidió)
peru_final %>% 
  select(NAME_1, obesidad_pct) %>% 
  filter(is.na(obesidad_pct))
```

```{r}
ggplot(peru_final) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = obesidad_pct), color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_viridis(
    option = "plasma",        # paleta tipo gradiente (como en el PPT)
    name = "Obesidad (%)",
    direction = -1            # colores oscuros = mayor obesidad
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Prevalencia de Obesidad por Departamento",
    subtitle = "Perú — ENDES 2022",
    caption = "Fuente: ENDES 2022 | Elaboración propia"
  ) +
  theme_void() +              # elimina ejes y fondo (limpio)
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption  = element_text(size = 8, color = "gray60"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```
